description_long: This mosque features a tall, slender structure with a prominent central dome and four smaller domes at the corners, all painted in a soft green hue. The main entrance is marked by a pointed archway and flanked by two cylindrical minarets that rise above the main building, each topped with a small green dome. The facade is adorned with arched windows and decorative columns, giving it a grand and elegant appearance. The base of the mosque is a cubic plinth with a grassy top and visible soil layers, some of which reveal bones and a small underground chamber. The overall design is stylized, with smooth surfaces and simplified architectural details, evoking a blend of Mughal and Indo-Islamic influences. The mosque is visually striking, with its harmonious color palette and iconic domed silhouette making it a recognizable landmark in any urban setting.
description: A tall, elegant mosque with a central green dome, four smaller domes, and two minarets, set atop a cubic base with grassy and earthy layers. The structure features arched windows, columns, and a grand entrance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, two minarets, and the central dome with four smaller domes; the cubic base displays grassy and earthy layers with bones.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the symmetry of the domes and minarets, with the cubic base and bones visible but no entrance.
description_view_2: Side view revealing the mosque's arched windows, the main entrance, and a cutaway section of the base exposing an underground chamber.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a larger cutaway in the base, showing more of the underground chamber and interior details beneath the mosque.
attribute_dome: Five domes are visible: one large central dome and four smaller domes at each corner, all rounded and painted green with a smooth finish and a finial atop the central dome.
attribute_minaret: Two minarets are present, each flanking the main entrance, rising slightly above the main structure, cylindrical in shape, and topped with small green domes.
attribute_architectural_style: Indo-Islamic with Mughal influences, characterized by domes, minarets, pointed arches, and decorative columns.
